overview: The B.Sc. Program in Computer Science & Engineering (CSE) is designed to produce skilled graduates in the field to satisfy the growing demands of computer engineering graduates in home and abroad. It provides the students an opportunity to obtain broad knowledge of Computer Science, Computer Engineering with freedom to tailor the program according to the student's individual needs.
waiver_info: Waiver-based waiver (bachelor's), Waiver on SGPA (semester result), Female quota, Need-based, Play quota, Physically challenged/specially-abled, tribal/ethnic group quota, Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota, Waiver for DIU alumni, Group admission quota, Freedom fighter quota, And many more.
eligibility: Students having minimum 2.5 GPA both in SSC/Dakhil/Vocational and HSC/Alim/Vocational from Science group with minimum 'C' grade in Physics, Mathematics, may apply for admission. Students completing five O-level subjects and at least two A-level subjects may apply. Out of these 7 subjects applicants must have minimum 4 'B' grade 3 'C' grade. The applicants must have Physics and Mathematics both at O-level and A-level.
curriculum_highlights: Introduction to Biology & Chemistry for Computation
